summary: A task posting app where users can submit tasks via a bottom-right plus button.

existing_features.title: Add a fixed floating action button (FAB) in the bottom-right corner of the HubView that, when clicked, opens the existing PostTaskModal for creating a new task. The button should display a '+' icon, be visually prominent using the app's green-to-purple gradient style, and be always visible while the user is on the hub view.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a bottom-right plus button that lets users post/create a new task
